universal_rules.name: Home type confirmed
universal_rules.pass_description: Customer confirms the type of home.
universal_rules.fail_description: The home type is not confirmed.

universal_rules.name: Homeowner confirmed
universal_rules.pass_description: Customer confirms they own the property.
universal_rules.fail_description: Customer rents, is not the owner, or ownership is not confirmed.

universal_rules.name: Recorded line confirmed
universal_rules.pass_description: Agent states that the call or line is recorded.
universal_rules.fail_description: The recorded-line disclosure is not stated.

rules.name: Home Type Approved
rules.pass_description: Pass when the property is a single-family home, townhouse, or condominium on the third floor or lower. A mobile or manufactured home passes only when it has both a permanent solid foundation and 2x4 framing.
rules.fail_description: Fail when the property is a shed, trailer, RV, condominium above the third floor, or a mobile or manufactured home without both a permanent solid foundation and 2x4 framing.

rules.name: Appointment Length
rules.pass_description: Customer accepts a 60-90 minute appointment.
rules.fail_description: The 60-90 minute length is missing, rejected, or contradicted.

rules.name: All decision makers present
rules.pass_description: All required decision makers will attend.
rules.fail_description: A required decision maker will not attend or attendance is not confirmed.

rules.name: Address Confirmed
rules.pass_description: Customer confirms the service address.
rules.fail_description: The address is not confirmed or the customer says it is wrong.

rules.name: Number Confirmed
rules.pass_description: Customer confirms or provides a phone or callback number.
rules.fail_description: No phone or callback number is confirmed, or the customer says it is wrong.

rules.name: Government Grant Disclosure
rules.pass_description: Pass only when the agent states that Renewal by Andersen does not participate in government or free-window assistance programs, states that all costs are paid by the homeowner, and the customer acknowledges the disclosure.
rules.fail_description: Fail when government assistance or free windows are discussed and any required part of the disclosure or customer acknowledgment is missing or contradicted.

rules.name: No unapproved projects
rules.pass_description: Pass when the project is a full replacement-window or approved replacement-door project in an existing opening and no excluded project type is requested.
rules.fail_description: Fail when the project is glass repair, door repair, screen-door-only, egress-window-only, storm-window-only without full replacement, or work on a shed, trailer, or RV.

universal_rules.name: Home type confirmed
universal_rules.pass_description: Customer confirms the type of home.
universal_rules.fail_description: The home type is not confirmed.

universal_rules.name: Homeowner confirmed
universal_rules.pass_description: Customer confirms they own the property.
universal_rules.fail_description: Customer rents, is not the owner, or ownership is not confirmed.

universal_rules.name: Recorded line confirmed
universal_rules.pass_description: Agent states that the call or line is recorded.
universal_rules.fail_description: The recorded-line disclosure is not stated.

rules.name: Approved Home Type
rules.pass_description: Pass when the property is a single-family home, detached house, multifamily home, duplex, or a townhome or condominium on the third floor or lower.
rules.fail_description: Fail when the property is a mobile or manufactured home, trailer, or a townhome or condominium above the third floor.
rules.mishear_description: multi family -> multifamily;town home -> townhome;mobil home -> mobile home;manufacture home -> manufactured home

rules.name: Credit Score
rules.pass_description: Pass when the customer states a credit score of 650 or higher.
rules.fail_description: Fail when the customer states a credit score below 650.

rules.name: Project Size
rules.pass_description: Any window count of 3 or greater is a Pass.
rules.fail_description: Any window count less than 3 is a Fail.
rules.mishear_description: tree windows -> three windows; too windows -> two windows

rules.name: No unapproved projects
rules.pass_description: Pass when the project is replacement windows or doors installed in existing same-size openings.
rules.fail_description: Fail when the project is for a shed, storm-window-only, screen-only, security-door-only, new construction, opening resize or conversion, demolition, or installation of customer-supplied products.
rules.mishear_description: store windows -> storm windows;screen stores -> screen doors;new constructions -> new construction

rules.name: Email Confirmed
rules.pass_description: Customer confirms or provides an email address.
rules.mishear_description: e male -> email;gmail dot com -> gmail.com
rules.fail_description: No email is confirmed or the customer says it is wrong.

rules.name: Phone Confirmed
rules.pass_description: Customer confirms or provides a phone or callback number.
rules.fail_description: No phone or callback number is confirmed, or the customer says it is wrong.

rules.name: Appointment Length
rules.pass_description: Customer accepts a 60-90 minute appointment.
rules.fail_description: The 60-90 minute length is missing, rejected, or contradicted.

rules.name: Confirmed Address

rules.fail_description: The address is not confirmed or the customer says it is wrong.

rules.name: Confirmed Email
rules.pass_description: Customer confirms or provides an email address.
rules.fail_description: No email is confirmed or the customer says it is wrong.

rules.name: Confirmed Phone
rules.pass_description: Customer confirms or provides a phone or callback number.
rules.fail_description: No phone or callback number is confirmed, or the customer says it is wrong.

rules.name: Decision Makers
rules.pass_description: All required decision makers will attend.
rules.fail_description: A required decision maker will not attend or attendance is not confirmed.

rules.name: Roof Age Or Damage
rules.pass_description: Roof is at least 15 years old or has qualifying damage, leaks, missing shingles, or storm damage.
rules.fail_description: Roof is under 15 years old with no qualifying damage, or the customer is only researching.

rules.name: Approved Roofing Type
rules.pass_description: Pass when the roof is asphalt or shingle, or the customer is willing to use asphalt shingles, and the project is not a flat or commercial roof.
rules.fail_description: Fail when the project is a flat or commercial roof or the customer requires metal, slate, or tile only.

rules.name: Approved Service
rules.pass_description: Pass when the project is a full roof replacement, a King Quality Roofing repair, or an approved window, siding, gutter, or entry-door replacement.
rules.fail_description: Fail when the project is a repair by another contractor, a flat or commercial roof, soffit-only, fascia-only, or sliding-door-only work.

rules.name: No Unapproved Projects
rules.pass_description: Pass when the work is on the main home. A skylight passes only when it is included with a full roof replacement.
rules.fail_description: Fail when the work is for a shed, greenhouse, detached outbuilding, or a skylight without a full roof replacement.

rules.name: Insurance Adjuster
rules.pass_description: Pass when the insurance adjuster has already inspected the property or the claim has already been approved.
rules.fail_description: Fail when the adjuster has not inspected the property or the customer is still waiting for the adjuster.

rules.name: Appointment Length
rules.pass_description: Customer accepts a 60-90 minute appointment.
rules.fail_description: The 60-90 minute length is missing, rejected, or contradicted.

rules.name: Approved Time Slot
rules.pass_description: Pass when the appointment is scheduled for 10:00 AM, 2:00 PM, or 6:00 PM.
rules.fail_description: Fail when the appointment is scheduled for any other time.

rules.fail_description: Fail when the project requires metal roofing only.

rules.pass_description: All required decision makers will attend.

rules.name: Roof Age Or Damage
rules.pass_description: Roof is at least 15 years old or has qualifying damage, leaks, missing shingles, or storm damage.
rules.fail_description: Roof is under 15 years old with no qualifying damage, or the customer is only researching.

rules.name: Approved Roofing Type
rules.pass_description: Pass when the project uses asphalt shingles, EPDM, or modified bitumen, or the customer is willing to use one of those approved roofing types.
rules.fail_description: Fail when the customer requires metal, slate, or tile only or refuses all approved roofing types.
rules.mishear_description: EPDM -> EPDM; modified bitumen -> modified bitumen

rules.name: Approved Service
rules.pass_description: Pass when the project is roof replacement or repair, leak investigation, missing-shingle repair, skylight repair or replacement, or chimney flashing.
rules.fail_description: Fail when the project is entry-door-only, glass-only repair, block windows, gutter-guard-only, Gutter Helmet, or half-round-gutter-only work.
rules.mishear_description: gutter helmut -> Gutter Helmet; block window -> block windows

rules.name: No Unapproved Projects
rules.pass_description: Pass when the work is on the main home. A skylight passes only when it is included with a full roof replacement.
rules.fail_description: Fail when the work is for a shed, greenhouse, detached garage, outbuilding, or a skylight without a full roof replacement.

rules.name: Insurance Adjuster
rules.pass_description: Pass when the insurance adjuster has already inspected the property or the claim has already been approved.
rules.fail_description: Fail when the adjuster has not inspected the property or the customer is still waiting for the adjuster.

rules.name: Appointment Length
rules.pass_description: Customer accepts a 60-90 minute appointment.
rules.fail_description: The 60-90 minute length is missing, rejected, or contradicted.

rules.name: Approved Time Slot
rules.pass_description: Pass when the appointment is scheduled for 9:00 AM, 1:00 PM, or 5:00 PM.
rules.fail_description: Fail when the appointment is scheduled for any other time.

rules.name: Roof Age Or Wear
rules.pass_description: Roof is at least 10 years old or has qualifying wear, damage, leaks, missing shingles, staining, or storm damage.
rules.fail_description: Roof is under 10 years old with no qualifying wear or damage.

rules.name: Approved Roofing Type
rules.pass_description: Pass when the project is for a residential asphalt, shingle, or metal roof.
rules.fail_description: Fail when the project is for a commercial flat roof or requires slate or tile only.

rules.name: Storm Claim Adjuster
rules.pass_description: Pass when the insurance adjuster has already inspected or reviewed the storm claim.
rules.fail_description: Fail when the adjuster has not inspected the property or the customer is still waiting for the adjuster.

rules.name: Approved Service
rules.pass_description: Pass when the project is residential roof replacement, roof inspection, leak evaluation, storm or insurance-claim work, or metal-roof replacement.
rules.fail_description: Fail when the project is a commercial roof or work on a shed or greenhouse roof.

rules.name: No Unapproved Projects
rules.pass_description: Pass when the work is on the main home. A skylight passes only when it is included with a full roof replacement.
rules.fail_description: Fail when the work is for a shed, greenhouse, outbuilding, or a skylight without a full roof replacement.

rules.pass_description: Customer accepts a 60-90 minute appointment.
rules.fail_description: The 60-90 minute length is missing, rejected, or contradicted.

rules.fail_description: Fail when the appointment is scheduled for any other time.

rules.name: Confirmed Address
rules.pass_description: Customer confirms the service address.
rules.fail_description: The address is not confirmed or the customer says it is wrong.

rules.name: Confirmed Email
rules.pass_description: Customer confirms or provides an email address.
rules.fail_description: No email is confirmed or the customer says it is wrong.

rules.name: Confirmed Phone
rules.pass_description: Customer confirms or provides a phone or callback number.
rules.fail_description: No phone or callback number is confirmed, or the customer says it is wrong.

rules.name: Exterior Material
rules.pass_description: Pass when the customer explicitly confirms the home's exterior material.
rules.fail_description: Fail when the exterior material is not confirmed.

rules.name: Garage Type
rules.pass_description: Pass when the customer explicitly confirms an attached garage, detached garage, or no garage.
rules.fail_description: Fail when the garage type is not confirmed.

rules.name: Window Count
rules.pass_description: Pass when the customer explicitly confirms the number of windows being replaced. There is no minimum window count.
rules.fail_description: Fail when the number of replacement windows is not confirmed.

rules.name: Decision Makers
rules.pass_description: All required decision makers will attend.
rules.fail_description: A required decision maker will not attend or attendance is not confirmed.

rules.name: Appointment Length
rules.pass_description: Customer accepts a 60-90 minute appointment.
rules.fail_description: The 60-90 minute length is missing, rejected, or contradicted.

rules.name: Vinyl Disclaimer
rules.pass_description: Pass when the agent states the required disclosure that Feldco replacement windows are vinyl.
rules.fail_description: Fail when the vinyl disclosure is omitted or the customer requires aluminum, wood, or storm windows only.

rules.name: Approved Service
rules.fail_description: Fail when the project is roofing, siding, storm-window-only, storm-door-only, repair-only, glass-only, a single-wide mobile home, or the customer is a renter or non-owner.
rules.mishear_description: single-wide -> single wide;store door -> storm door;double-wide -> double wide;store window -> storm window
rules.pass_description: Pass when the project is for replacement windows or approved replacement doors and the customer owns an eligible home.

rules.name: Approved Time Slot
rules.pass_description: Pass when the appointment uses an approved slot at 9:30 AM, 10:30 AM, 12:30 PM, 1:30 PM, 3:30 PM, 4:30 PM, or 6:30 PM and all day-specific scheduling restrictions are satisfied.
rules.fail_description: Fail when the appointment is on Sunday, violates Friday-to-Saturday or Saturday-after-5:00-PM restrictions, or uses a time outside the approved slots.
